title: Cobblemon: Battle League Official
description: The Official Modpack used in the Cobblemon: Battle League SMP
body:
**Experience the Modpack used by the trainers on the Cobblemon: Battle League SMP!**

### This pack includes;

- **Cobblemon**, along with a _variety_ of addons to enhance your experience (Mega Evolution, Alpha Pokemon, Badges and more!) 🌟
- **900+ Catchable Pokemon** thanks to the _All The Mons_ Datapack! 🐉
- **Additional Building Blocks**, for making your Pokemon Gyms! 💥
- **QoL Features** such as the **Effortless Building** Mod 🔧
- And more!

For a preview of what to expect, check out the series at [www.youtube.com/@GalaxiHD](https://www.youtube.com/@GalaxiHD)!
